creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This has to be one of our favourite discoveries recently, walking around @bloomsburylondon, a magical garden behind St George’s Church with a tucked away, outdoor cafe @espressobase serving incredible, Italian-style coffee and other alternatives (hot chocolate, chai latte, matcha latte, etc). They use only single origin Arabica, roasted by Hasbean coffee roasters.

There’s seating, lots of plants and even a mini fountain! You have to pop by the next time you’re nearby!

📍 St Georges Court, Bloomsbury Way, London WC1A 2SE
⏰ Open Monday to Thursday, 10.30 to 15.00

#hiddenlondon
